case_title: DOMINIC NGUYEN VS. PREMRIT TANG BENJAMAS ET AL

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NGUYEN, DOMINIC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BENJAMAS, PREMRIT TANG THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 765 ELLIS STREET #7, CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94109, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FOR POSTING AND MAILING OF SUMMONS FILED BY PLAINTIFF NGUYEN, DOMINIC
ORDER FOR POSTING AND MAILING OF SUMMONS (SEE SCANNED ORDER FOR DETAILS) COPY RETURNED IN SASE
DECLARATION RENTAL AGREEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF NGUYEN, DOMINIC

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF NGUYEN, DOMINIC AS TO DEFENDANT BENJAMAS, PREMRIT TANG DOES 1 TO 10 INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
